title: coffea dewevrei var. zenkeri
intro: Coffea dewevrei var. zenkeri, also known as the 'Afromontane coffee', is a variant of the Coffea dewevrei plant, a species of coffee native to the highlands of East Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health due to its high content of caffeine and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Coffea dewevrei var. zenkeri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and boost energy levels. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
